SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JO ANNE ADAMS--SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED 506)
